name: mysites-guru
title: MySites.guru
description: Search and manage your mySites.guru connected sites
author: PhilETaylor

commands.name: search-sites
commands.title: Site Search
commands.description: Search, inspect, and manage your mySites.guru sites

commands.name: run-audit
commands.title: Run Site Audit
commands.description: Find a site and queue a security audit

commands.name: create-backup
commands.title: Create Site Backup
commands.description: Find a site and queue a backup

commands.name: take-snapshot
commands.title: Take Site Snapshot
commands.description: Find a site and queue a file snapshot

commands.name: sign-out
commands.title: Sign Out
commands.description: Remove the stored MySites.guru OAuth session

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.title: OAuth Client ID
preferences.description: Client ID from your MySites.guru API client registration

preferences.name: listSiteAction
preferences.title: List: CMD+Enter Action
preferences.description: Action when pressing Command+Enter on a site in the search list (Enter always opens the detail view)

preferences.name: primarySiteAction
preferences.title: Detail: Enter Action
preferences.description: Action when pressing Enter in the site detail view

preferences.name: secondarySiteAction
preferences.title: Detail: CMD+Enter Action
preferences.description: Action when pressing Command+Enter in the site detail view

preferences.name: confirmSiteActions
preferences.title: Confirm Actions
preferences.label: Ask for confirmation before queuing audits, backups, and snapshots
preferences.description: Show a confirmation prompt before queuing audits, backups, or snapshots
